code_changes: Added backend-aware saga JSON binding helper.
Added saga JSON row normalization for native Postgres JSONB values and sqlite JSON text.
Added backend-aware saga FOR UPDATE select helper.
Saga create now binds native context values in Postgres mode and JSON text in sqlite mode.

selected.command: PYTHONPATH=.:../novaic-common python -m pytest tests/test_queue_postgres_saga_mutations.py tests/test_queue_postgres_saga_query_dialect.py tests/test_pr309_saga_fsm_store_ledger.py tests/test_pr313_worker_lease_ledger.py tests/test_pr310_saga_repository_fsm_cutover.py tests/test_pr308_saga_lifecycle_fsm.py tests/test_queue_postgres_boundary.py tests/test_queue_postgres_idempotency_diagnostics.py tests/test_queue_postgres_idempotency_complete_release.py tests/test_queue_postgres_idempotency_acquisition.py

Live Postgres runtime validation remains a later staging validation problem.
